name: hk
description: hk personal cross-project custom commands. /hk:pre-clear:save & /hk:pre-clear:resume hand off session context around /clear (writes/reads .hk/pre-clear/handoff.md); /hk:setup bootstraps a consuming project's .claude/settings.json from the bundled template (marketplace + enabledPlugins + safe permission defaults, non-destructive merge).
